final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-style photo of stylish coffee and dessert in a Korean cafe setting (all in-image text in Japanese).

Style/medium: needs a "Korean cafe Instagram aesthetic" — references in the spirit of 2010s Korean cafe interior photography, Japanese magazine "MORE" editorial spreads, Instagram flat-lay culture; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be smartphone-shot angle, no human subjects visible
Subject: must include coffee beverage and dessert items as focal subjects
Scene/backdrop: must be Korean cafe interior setting
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, airy atmosphere suitable for Instagram — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, muted pastel direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a clean, slightly glossy surface treatment — exact sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotations (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji) with diary-style comments:
  - 饮料: 味道・温度・心情 (例: 清爽、温柔的甜味)
  - 食物: 口感・美味 (例: 湿润、最高)
  - 空间: 氛围 (例: 放松、美好时光)
  - 整体: 一言总结 (例: 幸福过头了～)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Japanese by default; must preserve white fine hand-drawn line style, rough uneven single-stroke quality, outline tracing around objects, arrows and dotted lines for eye guidance, steam/sparkles/hearts/small emoticons as decoration with intentional留白 (white space), Instagram story meets magazine rough-note aesthetic, fashionable yet relaxed mood
Avoid: must avoid human subjects, must avoid over-decoration without留白
